chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-1476 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case 22.09.2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Khan Leghari, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate General Sindh ************** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitution Petition and submits that the petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after obtaining a new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018. Under these circumstances, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
